name: servicenow-mcp-ai
description: ServiceNow MCP server: 67 tools in 18 packages over the full REST surface (Table, Aggregate, Attachment, Import Set, Batch, CMDB/IRE, Catalog, Change, Knowledge, Email) with script intelligence, flow tracing, local code checking, ATF runs, multi-instance profiles, Mermaid generators and a two-axis policy model.
author: Ivan Baev <ivanbbaev@gmail.com>

scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && node --test test/*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high

trademark: servicenow-mcp-ai is an independent, community-built project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by ServiceNow, Inc. ServiceNow and related marks are trademarks or registered trademarks of ServiceNow, Inc., used here only nominatively to indicate compatibility.
